message:
fix: add struct type check before @hasField calls

@hasField only works on struct types, not pointer types. When dealing
with *runtime.PyObject, we need to check @typeInfo(_T) == .@"struct"
before calling @hasField to avoid compilation errors.

Fixed in:
- builtins/conversions.zig: len() generation for PyObject types
- unittest/assertions.zig: assertHasAttr/assertNotHasAttr
